infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Lens Lingo uses your camera to scan real-world objects so it can identify them and start a language lesson.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Lens Lingo uses your microphone so you can speak with your AI tutor and practice your pronunciation.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Lens Lingo accesses your photos so you can choose a picture of an object to identify and learn its translation.
